title: v1 invoke request (synchronous-only)
description: Request body a host sends to a plugin action to invoke it under contract_version 1. Synchronous-only: the plugin is expected to compute the final result and return it directly as the HTTP response (see invoke-response.schema.json), with no deferred completion event or operation status polling. This schema is domain-neutral: the 'input' property is an opaque, action-specific payload whose shape is out of scope for this repository.

contract_version.description: Fixed to 1 for the synchronous-only contract.

input.description: Opaque, action-specific input payload. Domain-neutral by design; this repository imposes no constraints on its shape.
